name: petlink-monorepo
description: PetLink — Monorepo con Turborepo, Next.js, Prisma y Supabase.

scripts.prisma:migrate: env -u DATABASE_URL -u DIRECT_URL npx prisma migrate dev --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:studio: env -u DATABASE_URL -u DIRECT_URL npx prisma studio --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:status: env -u DATABASE_URL -u DIRECT_URL npx prisma migrate status --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
